name: Merry Cocoa Mix
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Powdered chocolate flavor, Drink mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the instant nonfat dry milk and powdered chocolate drink mix in a large bowl.
2. Add cinnamon to taste.
3. Store the mixture in an airtight container.
Note: Makes approximately 3 1/4 cups of mix. To serve, place 3-4 heaping tablespoons in a mug and fill with boiling water. The recipe has no fat according to Carolyn's note.
